indicators.name: red chairs
indicators.rationale: Red chairs are not ergonomic and may cause discomfort over time.

indicators.name: glass tables
indicators.rationale: Glass tables are slippery and may be difficult to work on.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat personal work surface is available for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no dedicated lighting
indicators.rationale: No task lighting is available for screen work.

indicators.name: no dedicated layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is open and lacks a dedicated workspace.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of red chairs and glass tables suggests a casual and potentially uncomfortable working environment. There is no flat personal work surface, dedicated lighting, or a dedicated layout, making it challenging to set up a productive workstation.
